script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== claude as aixa, 90s timeout, real prompt ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'echo "What is 2+2? Answer with just the number." | timeout 90 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -10
echo '=== same for alejandro ==='
runuser -u alejandro -- bash -c 'echo "What is 2+2? Answer with just the number." | timeout 90 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -10
echo '=== same for rosi (most recently active) ==='
runuser -u rosi -- bash -c 'echo "What is 2+2? Answer with just the number." | timeout 90 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -10
echo '=== same for mskai ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- bash -c 'echo "What is 2+2? Answer with just the number." | timeout 90 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -10
echo '===END==='
